Container.Name: novel-builder
Container.Overview: Web UI for generating long-form fiction with local LLMs via Ollama. Upload story YAML files, configure models, and watch scenes generate in real time with live progress and full checkpoint/resume support.
Container.Description: Novel Builder — scene-by-scene long-form fiction generator using local Ollama LLMs. Supports Gemma 4, Qwen, and any Ollama-compatible model. Auto-pulls missing models, detects GPU vs CPU memory layout, and streams generation progress live.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Novel Builder web interface.

Config.Name: Workspace
Config.Description: Host path for story YAML files, checkpoints, and generated output. Persists across container restarts.

Config.Name: Ollama Host
Config.Description: URL of your Ollama server. Used as the default in the web UI settings.
